prompts.title: Auto-index document for RAG
prompts.content: A new document was added at {{payload.path}}. Index it for semantic search by calling the rag_index_document tool with scope_name='project_{{projectName}}' and document_path='{{payload.path}}'.

prompts.title: Critic: mission contradiction detected
prompts.content: The design-support critic detected a node in the knowledge graph that CONTRADICTS the current mission. This is the one permitted pull-based exception — the engineer should be made aware now. Invoke the design-support skill in `critic` mode: identify the contradicting node and the mission element it conflicts with (a `contradicts` edge to a current Mission* node), state the conflict to the engineer plainly and specifically, and record a Gap node for it. Do not resolve it unilaterally — surface it and let the engineer decide. Do not push anything else.
